methods.name: getCapabilities
methods.docs: Returns the native integrity capabilities available on the current platform.

methods.name: getWidevineFingerprint
methods.docs:
Returns an Android Widevine-derived fingerprint.

The default `fingerprint` is SHA-256 over the Widevine device unique ID and a salt.
If `hashSalt` is not provided, Android uses the app package name as the salt.

The raw Widevine ID is sensitive and is only returned as base64 when `includeRawId` is true.

methods.name: prepareAttestation
methods.docs:
Prepares native attestation state and returns the key/provider handle.

iOS: creates an App Attest key.
Android: prepares a Play Integrity Standard token provider.

methods.name: createAttestation
methods.docs: Creates a registration attestation token bound to a backend-issued challenge.

methods.name: createAssertion
methods.docs: Creates a request assertion token bound to a request payload.

methods.name: getDeviceCheckToken
methods.docs: Creates an iOS DeviceCheck token for server-side fraud-state lookups.

properties.name: platform
properties.docs: Platform currently executing the plugin.

properties.name: widevine
properties.docs: Android Widevine DRM support.

properties.name: appAttest
properties.docs: iOS App Attest support.

properties.name: deviceCheck
properties.docs: iOS DeviceCheck support.

properties.name: playIntegrity
properties.docs: Android Play Integrity support.

properties.name: supported
properties.docs: Whether the Widevine DRM scheme is supported by the device.

properties.name: fingerprintAvailable
properties.docs: Whether the Widevine device unique ID can be read.

properties.name: securityLevelScanSupported
properties.docs: Whether the Widevine security level property can be read.

properties.name: supported
properties.docs: Whether the capability is available on the current device.

properties.name: platform
properties.docs: Always `android`.

properties.name: source
properties.docs: Always `widevine`.

properties.name: fingerprint
properties.docs: Salted SHA-256 fingerprint for storing alongside a user record.

properties.name: widevineIdSha256
properties.docs: Unsalted SHA-256 hash of the Widevine device unique ID.

properties.name: widevineIdBase64
properties.docs:
Raw Widevine device unique ID encoded as base64.

Returned only when `includeRawId` is true.

properties.name: securityLevel
properties.docs: Widevine security level when available, for example `L1` or `L3`.

properties.name: vendor
properties.docs: DRM vendor when available.

properties.name: version
properties.docs: DRM plugin version when available.

properties.name: description
properties.docs: DRM plugin description when available.

properties.name: includeRawId
properties.docs:
Return the raw Widevine device unique ID as base64.

Defaults to `false`.

properties.name: hashSalt
properties.docs:
Optional salt used to derive `fingerprint`.

Android uses the app package name when omitted.

properties.name: keyId
properties.docs: iOS App Attest key ID or Android Play Integrity provider handle ID.

properties.name: format
properties.docs: Native attestation format used by the current platform.

properties.name: cloudProjectNumber
properties.docs:
Android only. Google Cloud project number for Play Integrity.

Can be configured globally via `plugins.DeviceIntegrity.cloudProjectNumber`.

properties.name: token
properties.docs: Token/assertion that must be verified server-side.

properties.name: keyId
properties.docs: Key/provider handle used to create the token.

properties.name: format
properties.docs: Native attestation format used by the current platform.

properties.name: keyId
properties.docs: Key/provider handle returned from `prepareAttestation()`.

properties.name: challenge
properties.docs: Backend-issued one-time challenge.

properties.name: cloudProjectNumber
properties.docs: Android only. Google Cloud project number for Play Integrity.

properties.name: keyId
properties.docs: Key/provider handle returned from `prepareAttestation()`.

properties.name: payload
properties.docs: Backend-issued one-time request payload or nonce.

properties.name: cloudProjectNumber
properties.docs: Android only. Google Cloud project number for Play Integrity.

properties.name: token
properties.docs: iOS DeviceCheck token encoded as base64.
